title: Online Pages dual-device screenshots and linked Activity
prompt: Publish a Page with separate desktop and mobile screenshots. Keep internal links relative, use shareUrl only for explicit sharing, and create a Page Activity that targets the returned pageId.
commands: pa-cli pages publish --file index.html --folder release-notes --desktop-thumbnail page-thumbnail-desktop.png --mobile-thumbnail page-thumbnail-mobile.png --title "Update notes" --summary "This client release" --desktop-thumbnail-alt "Desktop update notes preview" --mobile-thumbnail-alt "Mobile update notes preview" --overwrite --json

personal-agent activity upsert --capability <ephemeral> --type page --title "Update notes published" --detail "The release Page is ready to open." --target-type page --target-id "<pageId returned by pa-cli pages publish>" --idempotency-key "page:release-notes:published" --correlation-key "page:release-notes" --json

artifacts.label: Page screenshot and Activity target expectation
